title: Zoom — ONE green MODADD box at the gate level: a controlled modular adder (acc += 2 mod 3, controlled by x0 = q12). This is a Cuccaro-style modular adder; the multiplier chains 3 of these.
input: accumulator bits live in q5/q7/q9; q4..q11 = Cuccaro workspace (carry/flag/read)
output: if x0 = 1: accumulator += 2 (mod 3); else unchanged. workspace restored. CX = ripple/carry, CCX = majority/AND (the adder + mod-N reduction)
